boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Validate non-empty sterility report schema
    Given `contracts/domains/logme/sterility-report.schema.v1.json` defines required fields
    And the report generator has built an in-memory report contract
    When schema validation runs
    Then the contract should include:
      | field |
      | generatedBy |
      | schemaVersion |
      | reportPath |
      | configPath |
      | rootDir |
      | filesScanned |
      | localExecutableMethods |
      | domainBoundMethods |
      | methodsWithLogMeCall |
      | silentLocalMethods |
      | findings |
      | methods |
      | coverage |
      | verdict |
      | evidence |
    And markdown should be written only after schema validation passes.
acceptanceCriteria: And the report generator has built an in-memory report contract
And markdown should be written only after schema validation passes.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
